# Changelog

> Entries older than 60 days are pruned during dream consolidation.

| Date | Author | Change |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Bootstrap Azure DevOps decode + naming fix** — `GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineCommandHandler` now URL-decodes Azure DevOps organization/project/repository segments before passing them to the bootstrap generator, fixing CLI failures on project names containing spaces (`%20`). `BootstrapPipelineGenerationEngine` now emits explicit `stages/jobs` with readable display names and a clearer run name (`bootstrap-...`) for Azure DevOps UI. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Bootstrap Azure DevOps configure fix** — removed unsupported `--detect false` from generated `az devops configure` in `BootstrapPipelineGenerationEngine`. The bootstrap keeps `--detect false` only on Azure DevOps CLI commands that support it (`az repos`, `az pipelines`, variable group commands). |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Mono-repo Git push UX** — `project-detail` now shows a single mono-repo push button once Bicep, Pipeline, and Bootstrap project artifacts are all generated. `PushToGitDialogComponent` gained `isCombinedProjectPush` and now pushes the three artifact sets sequentially to the same branch using the existing project push endpoints. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Bootstrap Azure DevOps Windows-agent fix** — `BootstrapPipelineGenerationEngine` now emits Azure DevOps `powershell` steps instead of Bash-style `script` steps. Fixes bootstrap failures on self-hosted Windows agents (`cmd.exe`) caused by `|| true`, backslash continuations, Bash conditionals, subshell syntax, and `curl` usage. Generated bootstrap now uses PowerShell-native Azure CLI calls and `Invoke-RestMethod`, while keeping `$(System.AccessToken)` for Azure DevOps auth. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **IsExisting generation verification fix** — `ResourceGroupMappingConfig` now maps `IsExisting` on lightweight `/resource-group/{id}/resources` DTOs, and project-level generation preflight skips existing resources when collecting missing environment configuration warnings. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Pipeline Variables Tab — 4 fixes** — Backend: `ListProjectPipelineVariableGroupsQueryHandler` now returns variable usages (AppSettings, SecureParameterMappings, AppConfigurationKeys) inside each group via new `GetPipelineVariableUsagesAsync` repo method. New DTOs: `PipelineVariableUsageResult`/`Response`. Frontend: eager-load variable groups on page init (removed lazy-load on tab click), replaced unstyled `env-description` DERIVED_HINT with `settings-info-banner` pattern, config-detail filters groups to current config via `configVariableGroups` computed signal. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Health Probe UI Refactor** — Created reusable `ToggleSectionCardComponent` (shared, icon + title + subtitle + slide toggle + content projection, blue accent visual identity). Replaced flat probe forms in `add-resource-dialog` and `resource-edit` with toggle cards per probe type (readiness/liveness/startup). Toggle-on fills default values (path + port 8080). New i18n keys: `HEALTH_PROBES_SECTION`, `HEALTH_PROBES_DESC`, `*_PROBE_DESC` in both FR/EN. |
| 2026-05-14 | copilot | **ContainerApp Bicep Parameter Grouping** — Refactored 16 flat Container App Bicep params into 4 user-defined types (`ContainerRuntimeConfig`, `ScalingConfig`, `IngressConfig`, `HealthProbeConfig`). Extended `GeneratedTypeModule` with `ParameterTypeOverrides` and `ParameterGroupMappings`. `MainBicepAssembler` now emits module-level type imports and uses custom type names. `ParameterFileAssembler.ApplyEnvironmentOverrides` merges flat domain overrides into structured objects. `BicepFormattingHelper` handles `IDictionary<string, object>` serialization. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **Bootstrap Azure DevOps — Implementation complete** — Full feature: `BootstrapPipelineGenerationEngine` (PipelineGeneration), 5 CQRS classes (Generate + Download + PushToGit + GetFileContent commands/queries), 4 API endpoints (`POST/GET/GET/POST` on `/projects/{id}/generate-bootstrap-pipeline/*` and `push-bootstrap-pipeline-to-git`), DI registration, `GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineResponse` contract, `Errors.Project.BootstrapFilesNotFoundError/BootstrapFileNotFoundError`. Frontend: `GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineResponse` interface, 4 `ProjectService` methods, bootstrap signals + computed + methods in `project-detail.component.ts`, Bootstrap tab in generation panel (prerequisites checklist + terminal + file browser + What Next), push-to-git button, `PushToGitDialogData.isBootstrap` flag. i18n EN+FR `PROJECT_DETAIL.BOOTSTRAP.*` keys. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Container App Health Probes** — Full stack V1: 6 new nullable per-environment fields (readiness/liveness/startup × path+port) on `ContainerAppEnvironmentSettings`. Domain, Application, Contracts, Mapster, EF Core config + migration `AddHealthProbeFields`, Bicep templates (both with/without ACR) with conditional `probes` array using `union()`, FluentValidation (port 1-65535, path starts with `/`). Frontend: interfaces, i18n FR+EN, add-resource-dialog + resource-edit probe sections. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **IsExisting resources** — Full stack implementation: `IsExisting` bool on `AzureResource` domain base + all 18 concrete aggregates (Create factory, Update/SetEnvironmentSettings guards). EF Core migration `AddIsExistingToAzureResource`. All 18 Create commands, handlers, Contracts requests, Application Results, Contracts Responses updated. Bicep/Pipeline generation filters existing resources; `ExistingResourceReference` local refs added. Frontend: TypeScript interfaces, add-resource-dialog toggle (skips env step), config-detail amber badge, resource-edit hides Environments + App Pipeline tabs + shows amber info banner. i18n EN+FR. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Bootstrap Azure DevOps** — Architecture study complete. Detailed implementation plan produced: 12 étapes, 22 fichiers (15 backend, 7 frontend). New `BootstrapPipelineGenerationEngine` generates idempotent YAML (az CLI scripts) for provisioning ADO pipeline definitions + variable groups + authorizations. 4 new API endpoints. Frontend: 3rd tab "Bootstrap" in project-detail with prerequisites checklist + file preview + "What Next" guide. No domain/DB changes. |
| 2026-04-23 | copilot | **SecureParameterMapping** — New entity on `AzureResource` base class for mapping secure Bicep parameters (e.g. SQL Server admin password) to pipeline variable groups. Backend: Domain entity + EF config + CQRS commands/queries + API endpoints (`GET/PUT /azure-resources/{id}/secure-parameter-mappings`) + pipeline generation integration via `SecureParameterOverrideHelper`. Frontend: password pipeline config section in resource-edit (radio auto/VG, VG selector with create-new, variable name input). i18n EN+FR. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | **Security fix** — `ContainerAppEnvironmentTypeBicepGenerator`: removed `listKeys()` + `existing` LAW resource from generated module. Now uses `destination: 'azure-monitor'` + `Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings` with `workspaceId` (LAW resource ID). Eliminates shared key exposure in ARM deployment history. |
|------|--------|--------|
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Architecture study: documented Azure DevOps automation boundary in memory. Current integration is Git-only (`AzureDevOpsGitProviderService`), while future pipeline / variable group provisioning should use a dedicated capability and modern Azure DevOps auth (Entra OAuth / service principal) rather than PATs for production. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Name availability: DNS-based checker (replaced ARM), 10 resource types, `"current"` status for own deployed resources, save/submit blocking with bypass override in resource-edit + add-resource-dialog, async diagnostic rule system (`NameAvailabilityDiagnosticRule`). |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Resource abbreviation overrides: two-level system (Project + InfraConfig) with Set/Remove commands, regex validation `^[a-z0-9]+$`, Bicep/Pipeline generators use config→project→catalog precedence. Frontend: `EditAbbreviationDialogComponent`, project-detail filter by `usedResourceTypes`. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | SqlServer fixes: resource-edit page (version/adminLogin/TLS), ARM version normalization (`V12`→`12.0`), API version fix (`2021-11-01`). |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Bicep deployment fixes: BCP033 type coercion (`CoerceToOriginalType()`), BCP037 ContainerApp envVars injection placement, CAE unused `sku` param removal. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | User provisioning: refactored to `UserProvisioningMiddleware` (ASP.NET Core middleware), `IUserRepository` read-only, `CurrentUser` reads from `HttpContext.Items`. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Added `scripts/seed-project-snapshot.ps1` for full project seeding via API calls. Aspire upgraded to 13.2.3. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | Bicep generation: `SecureParameters` pattern for `@secure()` params, pipeline `overrideParameters` wiring, output symbol validation (BCP057 prevention), LAW auto-detection fallback with cross-config existing resource ID references, Storage companion `dependsOn`, `.bicepparam` array formatting fix, `PathSanitizer` for safe folder/pipeline names, module reference disambiguation via `(Name, ResourceTypeName)` tuples. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | Naming: live name availability endpoint (`POST /naming/check-availability/{resourceType}`), `AzureNamingConstraints` catalog (19 types), resource-type-aware template validation. |
| 2026-04-20 | copilot | Rewrote infra release pipeline artifact flow: stable `drop` artifact, `resources.pipelines` consumption, `checkout: none` + artifact-relative paths, CI validation, release preflight with Bicep→JSON compilation. |
| 2026-04-20 | copilot | Documented Aspire MCP detection trap: CLI `13.1.3` vs repo Aspire `13.2.0` version mismatch. |
| 2026-04-17 | copilot | Fixed `.bicepparam` file naming: ShortName for file, full Name for internal param. |
| 2026-04-16 | copilot | Bulk refactors: sealed EnumValueObject subclasses, string IDs (API-002), `.ProducesProblem(401)`, tag limits, `RoleAssignmentDomainService`, repository rename, camelCase Bicep, Refit GitHub, polymorphic TPT `DbSet`, ErrorOr all errors. |
| 2026-04-16 | copilot | Decoupled Aspire from API: removed Aspire NuGet packages/ServiceDefaults, moved DbContext/OTel/health into Infrastructure DI. |
| 2026-04-15 | copilot | Merged main into DDD-002 branch. Sealed all concrete `AzureResource` aggregates. Added audit-expert agent, audit-workflow skill, sync-audit-issues.ps1, recreated 66 GitHub audit issues. |
| 2026-04-14 | copilot | Audit automation: PowerShell entry points, UTF-8 reads, 62 audit issues, removed PS7 requirement. |
| 2026-04-13 | copilot | Added draw-io-diagram-generator skill, refreshed architecture diagram. |
| 2026-04-04 | copilot | Major: fixed Azure DevOps release pipeline issues, merged app pipeline generation into `POST /generate-pipeline`, moved AgentPoolName to Project, refactored BicepAssembler, FK cascade fixes. |
| 2026-04-03 | copilot | App pipeline generation, GitNexus integration + `13-code-graph.md`, ContainerApp pipeline/runtime fixes. |
| 2026-04-02 | copilot | Assign Identity refactor (domain/CQRS/Bicep/frontend/diagnostics). |
| 2026-04-01 | copilot | Windows-first conventions, i18n fixes, runtime stack/version in general config. |
| 2026-03-31 | copilot | EventHubNamespace full-stack, Configuration Keys tab redesign. |
| 2026-03-30 | copilot | ACR role assignment, pipeline variable groups, Unit of Work, domain code-quality conventions. |
| 2026-03-29 | copilot | Azure DevOps pipeline YAML generation, `AzureResourceManagerConnection`. |
| 2026-03-28 | copilot | Unified generation UX, mono-repo pipeline, secret/static app settings, architect agent. |
| 2026-03-27 | copilot | UAI grouping, nullable value objects, StorageAccount CORS/lifecycle in Storage tab. |
| 2026-03-26 | copilot | StorageAccount CORS redesign, queue/table Bicep generation, module renaming. |
| 2026-03-24 | copilot | LogAnalyticsWorkspace + ApplicationInsights end-to-end. |
